General.Name: Bever Holding NV
General.Description: Bever Holding NV operates as a real estate company in the Netherlands and Belgium. The company develops residential, hotels, and commercial properties. It also invests in, acquires, and leases real estate properties. The company was incorporated in 1975 and is based in Wassenaar, the Netherlands.

0.Name: Mr. Willy Jules Simon
0.Title: Chairman of the Supervisory Board & Interim Executive Director
